title: Sethome
description: A datapack version of the plugin "Sethome"
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602462b0d99577d69077e524637e50af1235a2d5.png)
**Sethome** is a powerful datapack (with an optional mod) that brings a complete /home and /sethome system to, fully automatic, performance-optimized, and 100% vanilla-compatible. Using a smart engine built on NBT storage, dynamic UUID detection, and marker-based teleportation, Sethome delivers a fast, reliable, and clean warp system for both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/671e8d295afa54a12627802b0df964ef42ca0753.png) ## Features - /trigger sethome Automatically saves the player’s location using their UUID Supports infinite homes per player Zero configuration — works instantly - /trigger home Teleports the player safely and precisely to their saved home Uses temporary markers for accurate positioning Ultra-fast execution with no lag ## Optimized Global Storage A single storage containing all player homes perfect for servers.
